title: SecretUri pub fields + read-only doc — right tradeoff for cross-crate access
description: SecretUri fields are pub with a doc comment saying treat them as read-only. A future contributor might suggest making them private with getters. The pub approach is correct here: the field struct is the API, getters would just be boilerplate that adds no safety (backends are trusted crates, not user code), and the doc comment documents the intent. The constraint cannot be enforced by the type system without significant complexity (builder or sealed trait), and that complexity would exceed the benefit.
